pi_items.source: task instructions and verifier.py logic explicitly checking for Contact, Warden, Assembly, and Equipment tables
setup_task.sh prose text and verifier.py checking logic

privileged_info_summary: The task uses a synthetically generated unformatted document at '/home/ga/Documents/emergency_action_plan_raw.docx'. The agent must format this document and save it to '/home/ga/Documents/emergency_action_plan_formatted.docx'. The instructions require extracting inline prose into exactly 4 distinct tables (Contact Directory, Warden Assignments, Assembly Points, and Equipment Inventory). The specific safety keywords that must be bolded are 'EVACUATE', 'SHELTER IN PLACE', 'LOCKDOWN', 'CALL 911', and 'DO NOT'.
